sections.paragraph:
ἐλωΐ (אֱלָהִי; Ἐλωΐ TestSol 6:8) Aram. for ἠλί, ἡλ(ε)ί my God Mt 27:46 v.l.; Mk 15:34. Cp. EKautzsch, Gramm. d. Bibl.-Aram. 1884, 11; Wlh. on Mk; Dalman, Jesus 184–87; FDanker, ZNW 61, ’70, 52f (lit.). BHHW I, 395f.—M-M.

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Wlh. Wlh. = JWellhausen, Einleitung—List 6

Dalman Dalman = GD., various works—List 6

ZNW ZNW = Zeitschrift für die ntl. Wissenschaft—List 6

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

BHHW BHHW = Biblisch-historisches Handwörterbuch—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 320
